per_turn_leaks.patient_response: It happens all the time, really. I mean, every hour or so, I'm coughing up something, whether it's just a little bit of mucus or a bigger amount like yesterday evening when I was worried that I might have brought up some blood - but it turned out to be just more yellowish-green stuff.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Do you have any sweating, nausea, or dizziness with it?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I've been experiencing night sweats for the past 4 nights - they're really bad, to the point where I'm soaking through my pajamas every night. Other than that, no, I don't usually feel nauseous or dizzy when I'm coughing, but it does make me feel a bit lightheaded if I exert myself too much.
